lessons.title: TCP/IP Model: The Four-Layer Reality
lessons.description: Compare the OSI reference model with the actual TCP/IP stack that runs the internet.

lessons.title: TCP Under the Microscope
lessons.description: Flags, sequence numbers, windowing, and the graceful (or abrupt) connection teardown.

lessons.title: UDP: Fire and Forget
lessons.description: When speed trumps reliability. UDP header, checksums, and real-world use cases.

lessons.title: Supporting Cast: ICMP and ARP
lessons.description: Essential network utilities that make IP work – pings, errors, and MAC address discovery.

lessons.title: Ports, Sockets, and Connections
lessons.description: How applications multiplex network access and how the OS tracks every conversation.
